focus_area: 通常レビュー（整合性・正確性）+ 影響範囲レビューを統合実施
stage_name: 通常レビュー（1回目）+ 影響範囲レビュー（1回目）
verified_facts: useAutoYes returns ONLY { lastAutoResponse }; it does NOT return autoYesEnabled/autoYesExpiresAt/toggleAutoYes. The issue's 案A code snippet is therefore not implementable as written.

autoYesStateMap (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:218) is already a per-CLI Map<string,{enabled,expiresAt}>. Each split already receives paneAutoYesEnabled = autoYesStateMap.get(paneCli)?.enabled (L1450, passed at L1467).
handleAutoYesToggle (L810-835) hardcodes cliToolId: activeCliTab — must be parameterized by the pane's CLI for per-split toggling.

Parent fetchCurrentOutput (L501-559) updates autoYesStateMap only for activeCliTab (L540-544). useTerminalPanePolling intentionally does NOT own auto-yes state (useTerminalPanePolling.ts:15-18), so non-active splits have no server-side auto-yes sync.
AutoYesToggle does its own client-side countdown from expiresAt (AutoYesToggle.tsx:56-69).
